title: Update source_object_meta_data to Upsert Instead of Delete-and-Insert
description: Change the `source_object_meta_data` update logic from deleting all previous entries and inserting new ones to updating existing entries in place (upsert pattern). This preserves any user-added data on existing records.
acceptance_criteria: Existing metadata entries are updated in place instead of deleted and re-created
No data loss during metadata refresh
middleware_changes: Refactored source_object_meta_data sync to use upsert logic instead of delete-all/insert-all.
implementation_notes: Prevents data loss when refreshing metadata from external sources.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed the logic and marked done.
